title: Substitute Teacher Note
text:
## Substitute Teacher Note

Dear teacher, your class was mostly {adjective} today.

At {number} o'clock, {person} asked if the {animal} counted as a lab partner.

The students finished page {number}, then began {verb ending in -ing} with the emergency {object}.

I confiscated {plural noun}, one {color} {food}, and a note that said please {verb} the principal.

Everyone became {emotion} during silent reading, but nobody {past-tense verb} the {place} or hid a {color} {noun} in the {clothing item} of the {job}.
